channel.title: BUbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: I Asked a Former Trump Official to Justify This War
item.description: Nadia Schadlow, a deputy national security adviser during Trump’s first term, explains how the U.S.-Israel war with Iran fits in with an “America Firs...

item.title: War Brings New Water Crises to an Already-Parched Iran
item.description: Iran has accused the United States of bombing a desalination plant on Qeshm Island. The country was already facing a severe water shortage.

item.title: War and the Economy
item.description: We look at the conflict’s global economic impact.

item.title: Trump Zigzags on When War Will End, and Investigators Search Epstein’s Ranch in New Mexico
AI isn’t killing jobs yet—CEOs are using layoffs to fund a $2.5 trillion arms race
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Trump says Iran war is ‘very complete, pretty much’ sparking global stock rally
item.description: But also, "we’re going to go further."

item.title: The AI risk that few organizations are governing
item.description: You know how many human users have access to your financial systems. Do you know how many AI agents do?

item.title: AI can double output. Human biology can’t
item.description: There's an AI burnout trap, and your productivity gains are fragile.

item.title: Democrats Sued to Find Out Whether Trump Will Send Armed Officers to Election Sites
item.description: In a lawsuit filed Tuesday, the D.N.C. sought to compel the government to say whether it plans to deploy armed federal officers in this year’s electio...

item.title: Anthropic’s Department of War lawsuit is even higher-stakes amid the AI boom
item.description: Anthropic suing the U.S. Department of War perhaps wasn’t a surprise, but it was nevertheless a shock.

item.title: Australia Gives Asylum to Iranian Soccer Players
item.description: The Australian government is helping the Iranian national women’s soccer team after state media called the players “traitors” for refusing to sing the...

item.title: Live Updates: Trump Sends Mixed Signals on When Iran War Might End
item.description: Facing pressure after a surge in energy prices, President Trump said the war would be over “very soon.” He later said the fighting would go on for at ...

item.title: Shots Fired at U.S. Consulate in Toronto, Police Say
item.description: The police said that there were no injuries. Television footage showed what appeared to be at least two bullet holes at the building’s entrance.

item.title: Civilians Killed by Strikes in Gulf States Are Almost All Migrant Workers
item.description: Since the American-Israeli attack on Iran began, at least 12 civilians have been killed in oil-rich Gulf countries. All but one of them were foreign n...
